since_last: 41% of 101 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.56%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -0.83% · Gold +1.28% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 41% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.56%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.56%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +15.84%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.84%, NXE +4.56%, DELL +4.14%, HPE +3.60%, OKLO +3.56%. Laggards: GEV -6.84%, SKHY -5.78%, TER -3.47%, MU -2.91%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.69% at $124.39
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
